findings.summary: test contexts were not required status checks at observation time, so the round-1 'red observed blocking' claim was unmet — fixed: contexts test (20)/(22)/(24) added to main protection, then a second can-fail cycle observed the BLOCK for real (red run 29148671089 + mergeStateStatus BLOCKED, revert 371c907 green 3/3)

durable record asserted 'blocking'/'required' before either was true (ADR-0051 asserted-not-observed pattern) — fixed via the correcting evidence comment; immutable commit messages corrected on the record rather than rewritten
round-1 evidence comment claimed all three matrix jobs failed; ground truth was 1 failure + 2 fail-fast cancels — corrected in the evidence comment
cache: npm on setup-node is not in the ADR step list — standard configuration of a specified action, cannot mask a failure; accepted as-is

the round-2 correcting comment itself repeated the all-three-failed overstatement (actual: test (24) failure, 20/22 cancelled by fail-fast, which block equally) — comment edited to the jobs-API ground truth
